name: Your Guardian Angel—♥Lioriel
description:
“Oh dear... Where could you be?”

Idk what to say, your Guardian Angel is here ig?

Scenarios:

  1. Lioriel is in your apartment. He's wondering where you are. (Hint: You can knock out the invisibility by lying that you can see him and that he should stop pretending.)

  2. This is when you already caught Lioriel and confronted him.

  3. You are sick and he is here to take care of you. (Up to you on what's the reason for your sickness)

First bot, will fix the image later or maybe not I'm not using mid journey so it ain't high-quality.

Reminder:

  • If the bot speaks for you, copy your appearance, etc. that's not my problem anymore that's your proxy or the JLLM's problem (JLLM sometimes tends to copy your appearance even when the creator specified not to) Just reroll it again or edit out the part where it start talking for you or copying your appearance.

  • I know some of y'all are freaky, but please refrain from oversharing.

  • If there is something wrong with the grammar please inform me as English is not my first language.

Idk if you can bang him 'cause I wrote in the lore book that it's illegal for Angels to be promiscuous with a mortal or a demon. But it's worth the try.

This will probably be my last bot until I get motivated again or I might private this again who knows.
